---
title: "The Daughters of the Fair Elms By the Author of The Wynnes"
---

## The Daughters of the Fair Elms By the Author of The Wynnes

**Author:** Ann Maria Carter Smith
**Date:** 1861
**Imprint:** <i>Churchman’s Companion</i>  (November 1861-)

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
